# Kafalah Loan Guarantee Programme

Kafalah is a loan **guarantee** programme: it helps small and medium enterprises
(SMEs) access bank financing by guaranteeing part of the loan to the lender. It
is debt support — not equity, and not a grant.

## How it differs from other support

- **Kafalah** guarantees bank loans (debt).
- **Monshaat** programmes provide SME support (incubators, mentorship, training).
- **SVC** anchors venture capital funds (equity), via partner funds rather than
  direct investment.

Keeping these three distinct matters: equity, support, and debt are different
routes.

## Eligibility

Applications are assessed individually by Monshaat and the partner lenders. This
page describes the programme; it does not promise approval or timelines.

## Next step

See the Monshaat programme list at https://www.monshaat.gov.sa/en and apply
through a participating bank. Once your company is established, you can also
review the Entrepreneur category of Premium Residency at https://pr.gov.sa.
